title: SpaceX aborts Starship test flight, sending stock lower
summary_full: Elon Musk said it would make another attempt "hopefully in a few days."  SpaceX completed the maiden test flight of its Starship V3 rocket in May.
summary_public: Elon Musk said it would make another attempt "hopefully in a few days."  SpaceX completed the maiden test flight of its Starship V3 rocket in May.
